summary: Implemented the F004 client shell: a disposable client read-model package, a rebuildable map-renderer scene shell, a modest React UI package, and a Vite/Vitest web app that projects the existing deterministic hello result without storing authoritative WorldState in React.

tests_run.result: Updated workspace lockfile for React 19.2.7, React DOM 19.2.7, PixiJS 8.19.0, Vite 8.1.0, Vitest 4.1.9, and related type/plugin packages.
Command "test:e2e" not found; Playwright baseline is not present yet and remains deferred to FOUNDATION-005.
Recursive workspace typecheck passed for existing hello packages plus client-core, map-renderer, ui, and web.
ESLint passed for apps, packages, tools, and root config files.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 1 expected violation.
Format check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture check passed.
Listed active tasks; FOUNDATION-004 remains IN_PROGRESS pending review.
FOUNDATION-005 is the next ready draft task.

decisions: Used a small explicit read-model store in @monsoon/client-core rather than Redux for this shell, matching docs/03 allowance for an equivalent small explicit store before full UI state selection.
Declared React/Pixi/Vite/Vitest dependencies that are already frozen stack choices in docs/03; no new ADR was needed for this F004 shell.
Kept apps/web/src/dev untouched; web tests live under apps/web/src/shell.
Kept map-renderer authority-free: it consumes ClientMapReadModelSnapshot and can rebuild its scene layer from that snapshot.
risks: Playwright/e2e remains absent by design until FOUNDATION-005, so pnpm test:e2e --project=chromium fails with command not found.

PixiJS 8.19.0 currently exposes WebGPU/DOM declarations that conflict with TypeScript 6 DOM library under skipLibCheck=false, so the F004 map-renderer shell uses an adapter-injected Pixi scene host and memory host for tests; the real browser Pixi factory should be added with the F005/Future renderer test baseline.
requested_action: Review architecture boundaries, read-model authority separation, dependency/package shape, and the recorded e2e deferral for FOUNDATION-005.
